metadata.description: Studio Shipgate — two autonomous, parallel, worktree-isolated work cycles for Claude Code: /turbo (generic) and /kaizen (self-improving; scaffolds into the project).

plugins.name: shipgate
plugins.description: Two autonomous, parallel, worktree-isolated work cycles sharing one DAG execution engine: /turbo (generic, stateless) and /kaizen (self-improving — playbooks, per-agent memory, mandatory self-editing retro; scaffolds an editable copy into the project on first run).
